mapper.select:
SELECT SEQ ,RULEID ,CONDITION ,OPERATOR ,FACTOR ,SANCTIONTYPE FROM [XBOLTADM].[TB_RULE_PATH] WHERE RULEID = #{ruleId}
AND CONDITION = #{condition}
SELECT DISTINCT TRP.CONDITION AS CODE , TD.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_RULE_PATH TRP Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TRP.CONDITION = TD.TypeCode WHERE TRP.RULEID = #{ruleId}
